title: Dashboard web server installation docs
description: Expand installation documentation with component prerequisites and nginx/Apache httpd examples for publishing the dashboard on Linux and BSD.
acceptance_criteria: Installation docs list prerequisites for server, agent, dashboard, build, and service operation.
Installation docs include nginx config for serving dashboard/dist publicly and proxying /api to the server.
Installation docs include Apache httpd config for serving dashboard/dist publicly and proxying /api to the server.
Installation docs include development-only reverse proxy examples to Vite.
Docs state that Vite dev server is not the recommended public production host.

tasks.title: Update installation docs
tasks.description: Add prerequisites and Linux/BSD dashboard publishing examples to docs/installation.md.
acceptance_criteria: nginx and Apache httpd examples are complete enough to copy and adapt.
Examples cover static dashboard hosting and Vite dev proxying.
tasks.implementation_notes: The C++ server exposes REST API on 8080 and does not serve dashboard/dist. Vite dev server runs on 127.0.0.1:5173. Production examples should serve dashboard/dist and proxy /api to 127.0.0.1:8080.

tasks.title: Release bookkeeping and verification
tasks.description: Bump MODULE.bazel, update CHANGELOG.md, mark plan complete, and scan docs for the new web server sections.
acceptance_criteria: Changelog records the install doc expansion.
Verification confirms nginx, Apache, Vite, and prerequisites sections are present.

integration: Search docs for nginx, Apache, Vite, and prerequisites.

tasks.implementation_notes: Docs-only change; no code build required.
